title: Dyed Layer - An FSR Addon
description: A Texture Pack that adds armor trims like colors  and tint the dyed armors on the Hypixel Skyblock gamemode, made for the FurfSky Reborn Pack
body:
This unoficial pack made for Hypixel' Skyblock applies over FurfSky Reborn. It adds new models on Dyed Armors to let the colors be visible without (or at least tries to) losing the style of the pack.
Those models are hande-made, grey scaled versions of FurfSky Reborn armor models.


It supports both Dyes and Exotics, except if the dye has the same color as the original piece of armor (ex: Pure Black Dye won't change the color of items like Rancher's Boots or Obsidian Chestplate). And yes, animated dyes will be visible since it's using the vanilla leather armor color.

This pack can also works on its own without Furfsky if you only want armors without the custom items !


The pack is incomplete for now and is being worked on, it'll receive updates whenever Furfsky Reborn releases new armors, and will often have its models tweaked if I find better ways to render the dyes.




All the icons and models are made on Blockbench using Furfksy Reborn assets.

/!\ Due to deep changes in the way FurfSky Reborn will work, this project is on pause until everything has been finished. The 1.8.9 version support will be dropped and only updated for 1.21.8+ once updated.
